Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 230}You can now {f 0 1 2}receive invites via messages from your Social Links{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}After you've {f 0 1 2}visited a business at least once, you'll be added to their mailing list{f 0 1 27}. Visit different facilities to receive updates and special offers.[n]{f 1 1}
